fields.title: harden status module error and schema boundaries
fields.description: Refactor status/index.ts to avoid throw+decodeUnknownSync on external data. Keep errors typed/data-first and decode through Effect/Schema boundaries with explicit recovery paths.
fields.close_reason: Hardened status boundaries: removed decodeUnknownSync + throw new Error paths on external data, introduced typed boundary errors and schema-safe decoding.
